headline: JPMorgan’s Dimon warns of brewing market storm
summary: Jamie Dimon’s annual shareholder letter has become one of the most closely watched documents on Wall Street over the last two decades of banking. The JPMorgan Chase CEO released his latest 48-page letter on Monday, April 6, and this year, its tone is noticeably sharper than in years past. ...

headline: Shifting Narrative For Standard Chartered (LSE:STAN) As Analyst Targets And Valuation Assumptions Rebalance
summary: Standard Chartered’s fair value price target has been trimmed slightly from £19.25 to £18.96, with other Street targets now clustering from £18.30 up to £22.00. That small shift mirrors the current mix of analyst views, where upbeat earnings assumptions sit alongside questions about how much investors should be willing to pay and why some targets, such as £18.65 from £21.22, are being reset. As you read on, you will see how these moving targets fit into the broader narrative and how to keep...
